description: Pinned reference projects cloned into /data/eniak/refs for local study. This file is the source of truth for what version of each reference ENIAK has been compared against. Use these SHAs when citing a pattern in design docs (e.g. 'ported from storm@fb951af7').

refs.name: langgraph
refs.purpose: Durable stateful agent graph with checkpointers (Postgres/SQLite) and human-in-the-loop. Candidate substrate for Phase 3+ orchestrator; not used in Phase 2.

refs.name: deer-flow
refs.purpose: Production super-agent harness with skills, sub-agents, sandboxes, memory, MCP. Closest end-to-end architectural twin.

refs.name: open_deep_research
refs.purpose: LangGraph-native deep-research blueprint. Worked example of langgraph multi-agent research.

refs.name: paper-qa
refs.purpose: Scientific-document RAG with PDF chunking and citation grounding. Directly transplantable to EvidenceCard generation.

refs.name: graphiti
refs.purpose: Bi-temporal knowledge graph: Episode -> EntityNode -> EntityEdge with validity windows + hybrid (BM25+vector+rerank) search. Model for cross-document claim/citation graph.

refs.name: storm
refs.purpose: Two-stage outline -> article with multi-perspective question asking. Best long-form writing reference; nothing else here does structured long-form.

refs.name: LongWriter
refs.purpose: AgentWrite plan -> write-per-paragraph -> stitch pipeline for >10k word outputs. ICLR 2025. Port for chapter-length draft generation.

refs.name: quarto-cli
refs.purpose: Book project layout (_quarto.yml, parts, chapters, cross-refs). Writer emits Quarto-flavored Markdown; Publisher exports.

refs.name: research-claw
refs.purpose: Self-hosted research assistant with channels/feishu.py, project/session model, Overleaf+Git sync. Only ref with real Feishu publishing.

refs.name: oapi-sdk-python
refs.purpose: Official Lark/Feishu v2 Python SDK. Source for docx block schema, wiki node API, tenant token auto-refresh.

refs.name: langfuse
refs.purpose: Content-addressed prompt registry with labels (production/staging) + token/cost ledger + tracing. Source of truth for PromptTemplate and CostLedger entities.

refs.name: litellm
refs.purpose: OpenAI-format unification across 100+ providers + budget manager + retries. Drop-in for ENIAK model layer.

refs.name: phoenix
refs.purpose: OTel traces + LLM-as-judge + datasets/experiments. Eval harness for retrieval recall and citation faithfulness. Caveat: ELv2 license, self-host only.

refs.name: agentevals
refs.purpose: Lightweight trajectory match (strict / unordered / subset) + LLM-as-judge. Wire into orchestrator regression tests.

refs.name: de-anthropocentric-research-engine
refs.purpose: Markdown skill bank (gap detection, hypothesis generation, adversarial stress-testing). Treat as a prompt/SOP library, not as architecture.

refs.name: ljg-skills
refs.purpose: Claude Code skills for reading: ljg-paper (paper digestion for non-specialists), ljg-paper-river (citation lineage), ljg-book (5-element book breakdown), ljg-read (translation/structure/cross-disciplinary). Port the skill schema as Writer prompts and the book-breakdown structure as a Book outline template.
refs.caveat: No LICENSE detected at clone time (2026-05-27). Treat as study-only until license clarified; do not copy text verbatim into ENIAK.

dropped.name: autoresearch
dropped.reason: Single-GPU self-modifying training loop. Zero overlap with research+book pipeline. Also confusingly shares a name with the user's private /data/science/autoresearch.

dropped.name: agent-framework
dropped.reason: .NET-primary, Python is afterthought. Every orchestration capability is already covered by langgraph with better Python ergonomics.

dropped.name: gpt-researcher
dropped.reason: Same shape as open_deep_research (plan -> parallel search -> summarize -> report) but with more cruft. Keep open_deep_research as the canonical langgraph-native reference.
